title: 16oz Square Glass Food Storage Containers with Lids, 500ml Glass Meal Prep Container, Airtight Lunch Box for Kitchen Storage & Organisation, Microwave, Freezer and Dishwasher safe (4 Pack)
features: Premium Borosilicate Glass Construction‌: Manufactured from high-quality, strengthened borosilicate glass Suitable for direct temperature transitions (-4℉up to 752℉), Oven, microwave, freezer, and dishwasher safe capabilities

Intelligent Space-Saving Design‌: Square-shaped stackable containers for optimized storage Efficient organization for refrigerators and kitchen cabinets Maintains countertop and shelf space efficiency

Leak-Proof Preservation System‌: Snap-lock lids with silicone seals for complete airtight closure Maintains food freshness longer than standard plastic containers Ideal for meal preparation, leftovers, and liquid transport
Versatile Meal Solution Set‌: 8-piece multipurpose set (4 containers + 4 lids) 500m oz cup l capacity suitable for various food types, Perfect for home kitchen, office lunches, and outdoor activities
User-Centric Safety Features‌: BPA-free lid materials ensuring food safety, Heat-resistant glass capable of withstanding thermal shock, Easy maintenance with full dishwasher compatibility
description: Product Description H.JSS WDJS square glass food storage containers with lids, 500ml glass food containers for lunch Premium Borosilicate Glass Construction‌ Leak-Proof Airtight Sealing System‌ Space-Efficient Stackable Design‌ Multi-Functional Meal Prep Solution‌ User-Centric Safety & Convenience‌ Premium Borosilicate Glass Our 2cup glass square storage container set is made of premium borosilicate glass. Comparing with normal glass, the heat-resistant is up to 400℉, which makes them safe for freezer, microwave and dishwasher. Air valve This 16oz square glass food container can fit from a refrigerator to a microwave, but please remove the lid before entering the microwave leak-proof Each lid of this small square glass container has a silicone ring, which can effectively prevent leakage, seal, isolate air, and prolong the freshness of food
